description: You are a quantitative analyst evaluating a 10MW / 20MWh lithium-ion battery energy storage system (BESS) in Southern California. Using the 2023 Day-Ahead Market (DAM) hourly prices for the CAISO SP15 node located at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/caiso_sp15_2023_8760.csv, build a 365-day financial dispatch model to estimate the annual gross margin. Assume exactly one optimal charge/discharge cycle per day based on the daily minimum and maximum prices. The asset has a 20 MWh discharge capacity and 85% Round-Trip Efficiency (requiring 20 / 0.85 MWh to fully charge). Incorporate a $200 per cycle degradation cost, where a cycle only occurs if the daily net revenue exceeds this cost. The model must include a sheet named 'Daily Analysis' that calculates the daily dispatch decisions and profits, along with the Total Annual Profit and Total Cycles for the year. Save the completed workbook to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/bess_arbitrage_model.xlsx.
